entries.name: Vengeful Retreat
entries.desc: Remove all snares and vault away. Nearby enemies take 5 Physical damage.

entries.name: Voidblade
entries.desc: Unleash your glaives and charge to your target, dealing 853 Cosmic damage.

entries.name: Sigil of Misery
entries.desc:
Place a Sigil of Misery at the target location that activates after 2 sec.

Causes all enemies affected by the sigil to cower in fear, disorienting them for 15 sec.

entries.name: Vengeful Bonds
entries.desc: Vengeful Retreat reduces the movement speed of all nearby enemies by 70% for 3 sec.

entries.name: Unrestrained Fury
entries.desc: Increases maximum Fury by 20.

entries.name: Shattered Restoration
entries.desc: The healing of Shattered Souls is increased by 10%.

entries.name: Improved Sigil of Misery
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Sigil of Misery by 30 sec.

entries.name: Bouncing Glaives
entries.desc: Throw Glaive ricochets to 1 additional target.

entries.name: Imprison
entries.desc: Imprisons a demon, beast, or humanoid, incapacitating them for 1 min. Damage may cancel the effect. Limit 1.

entries.name: Charred Warblades
entries.desc: You heal for 3% of all Fire damage you deal.

entries.name: Void Nova
entries.desc: Unleash an eruption of void energy, dealing 104 Cosmic damage and stunning your target and all nearby enemies for 2 sec.

entries.name: Improved Disrupt
entries.desc: Increases the range of Disrupt to 10 yds.

entries.name: Consume Magic
entries.desc: Consume 1 beneficial Magic effect removing it from the target.

entries.name: Aldrachi Design
entries.desc: Increases your chance to parry by 3%.

entries.name: Focused Ire
entries.desc: The primary target of Chaos Nova is stunned for an additional 2 sec.

entries.name: Master of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and snares all enemies hit by 50% for 6 sec.

entries.name: Champion of the Glaive
entries.desc: Throw Glaive has 2 charges and 10 yard increased range.

entries.name: Disrupting Fury
entries.desc: Disrupt generates 30 Fury on a successful interrupt.

entries.name: Blazing Path
entries.desc: Shift gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Swallowed Anger
entries.desc: Consume Magic generates 20 Fury when a beneficial Magic effect is successfully removed from the target.

entries.name: Aura of Pain
entries.desc: Increases the critical strike chance of Immolation Aura by 6%.

entries.name: Live by the Glaive
entries.desc:
When you parry an attack or have one of your attacks parried, restore 2% of max health and 10 Fury. 

This effect may only occur once every 5 sec.

entries.name: Pursuit
entries.desc: Mastery increases your movement speed.

entries.name: Soul Rending
entries.desc:
Leech increased by 6%.

Gain an additional 6% leech while Metamorphosis is active.

entries.name: Felfire Haste
entries.desc: Fel Rush increases your movement speed by 10% for 8 sec.

entries.name: Infernal Armor
entries.desc: Immolation Aura increases your armor by 20% and causes melee attackers to suffer 4 Fire damage.

entries.name: Burn It Out
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Disease effect.

entries.name: Soul Cleanse
entries.desc: Immolation Aura removes 1 Curse effect.

entries.name: Lost in Darkness
entries.desc: Spectral Sight has 5 sec reduced cooldown and no longer reduces movement speed.

entries.name: Illidari Knowledge
entries.desc: Reduces magic damage taken by 3%.

entries.name: Guile
entries.desc: The cast range of Voidblade, Consume Magic, and Disrupt are increased by 20 yds.

entries.name: Will of the Illidari
entries.desc: Increases maximum health by 3%.

entries.name: Internal Struggle
entries.desc: Increases your mastery by 2.6%.

entries.name: Furious
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that generate Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: Remorseless
entries.desc: Attacks and abilities that spend Fury deal 3% increased damage.

entries.name: First In, Last Out
entries.desc: Shift grants you a rapidly decaying shield equal to 6% of your maximum health.

entries.name: Erratic Felheart
entries.desc: The cooldown of Fel Rush is reduced by 1.0 sec.

entries.name: Final Breath
entries.desc: Fully channeling Void Ray increases the damage of its final tick by 300%.

entries.name: Darkness
entries.desc:
Summons darkness around you in an 8 yd radius, granting friendly targets a 15% chance to avoid all damage from an attack. Lasts 8 sec.

Chance to avoid damage increased by 100% when not in a raid.

entries.name: Demon Muzzle
entries.desc: Interrupting a spell with Disrupt decreases your magic damage taken by 15% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Soul Splitter
entries.desc: Any time you would generate one or more Soul Fragments, you have a 2% chance to generate an additional Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Wings of Wrath
entries.desc: Glide speed increased by 10%.

entries.name: Long Night
entries.desc: Increases the duration of Darkness by 3 sec.

entries.name: Pitch Black
entries.desc: Reduces the cooldown of Darkness by 120 sec.

entries.name: Demonic Resilience
entries.desc: Blur gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Void Ray
entries.desc:
Requires 100 Fury
Unleash a beam of concentrated void energy, dealing 75 Cosmic damage and consuming 5 Fury every 0.1 sec.

Effect ends after 2.7 sec or upon reaching 0 Fury.

entries.name: Soul Immolation
entries.desc: Light your soul aflame, healing yourself for 24% of your maximum health, generating 30 Fury and shattering 3 Soul Fragments over 5 sec.

entries.name: Predator's Thirst
entries.desc:
Consume damage increased by 15%.

Consume generates a Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Tempered Soul
entries.desc: The cooldown of Soul Immolation is reduced by 30 sec and it gains 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Spontaneous Immolation
entries.desc: Soul Immolation heals for an additional 4% of your health over its duration and its cooldown is reset upon killing an enemy that yields experience or honor.

entries.name: Void Metamorphosis
entries.desc:
Collecting 50 Soul Fragments grants access to Void Metamorphosis.

 Void Metamorphosis
Requires 50 Soul Fragments

You ascend to a higher state of being, substantially empowering your abilities.

While in Void Metamorphosis, your Consume and Reap are enhanced and your Fury will slowly drain. Additionally, Void Ray reduces your Fury drain, deals increased damage, and no longer consumes Fury.

entries.name: Feast of Souls
entries.desc: Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Scythe's Embrace
entries.desc: Reap now generates 10 Fury.

entries.name: Duty Eternal
entries.desc: Voidblade damage increased by 100% and Voidblade now generates 20 Fury.

entries.name: Collapsing Star
entries.desc:
While in Void Metamorphosis, every 30 Soul Fragments harvested grants access to Collapsing Star.

 Collapsing Star
Channel an immense amount of void energy into a single, cataclysmic blast, dealing 2,139 Cosmic damage to your target and 1,604 Cosmic damage to all nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

While casting Collapsing Star, your Fury drain is significantly reduced.

entries.name: Moment of Craving
entries.desc: After fully channeling Void Ray, the cooldown of Reap is reset and your next Reap will collect up to 6 additional Soul Fragments.

entries.name: Gift of the Void
entries.desc: Your critical strike chance is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Entropy
entries.desc:
While in combat, generate 1 Soul Fragment every 12 sec.

While out of combat, you will slowly build towards your Void Metamorphosis, up to 25 Soul Fragments.

entries.name: Waste Not
entries.desc: Damage from Void Ray has a 200% increased chance to generate a Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Soulshaper
entries.desc: Each Soul Fragment gathered by Reap increases its damage by 8%.

entries.name: Singed Spirit
entries.desc: Soul Immolation generates an additional 12 Fury over its duration.

entries.name: Sweet Suffering
entries.desc:
The duration of Feast of Souls is increased by 1 sec.

 Feast of Souls
Soul Fragments grant 1% increased damage for 6 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Second Helping
entries.desc: Reap gains an additional charge.

entries.name: Umbral Blade
entries.desc: Reap's cooldown is reduced by your Haste.

entries.name: Improved Consume
entries.desc: Consume deals 10% increased damage and its cast time is reduced by 0.25 sec.

entries.name: Sweet Release
entries.desc: Your chance to shatter a Soul Fragment from enemies you damage is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Voidpurge
entries.desc: Void Ray's cooldown during Void Metamorphosis is reduced by 2.0 sec.

entries.name: Hungering Slash
entries.desc:
After dealing damage with The Hunt or Voidblade, Voidblade is replaced with Hungering Slash for 6 sec.

 Hungering Slash
Violently slash your scythe around you, dealing 940 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies and generating 10 Fury. Shatters up to 2 Soul Fragments from nearby enemies. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

Hungering Slash grants a temporary charge of Vengeful Retreat and causes your next Vengeful Retreat within 6 sec to deal an additional 570 Cosmic damage.

entries.name: Voidrage
entries.desc: Your Mastery is increased by 2%.

entries.name: Focused Ray
entries.desc: Void Ray deals 80% more damage when damaging 3 targets.

entries.name: Soulforged Blades
entries.desc: Hungering Slash and Voidblade's critical strike chance is increased by 15%.

entries.name: Singular Strikes
entries.desc:
Voidblade damage increased by 25%.

Hungering Slash deals 50% increased damage to its primary target.

entries.name: Demonic Instinct
entries.desc: Void Ray and Hungering Slash damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Devourer's Edge
entries.desc: Reap and Consume damage increased by 10%.

entries.name: Voidglare Boon
entries.desc: After fully channeling Void Ray, gain 10 Fury.

entries.name: Rolling Torment
entries.desc: When Void Metamorphosis expires, for each unused Soul you harvested, gain 5 Fury and increase your damage by 0.50% for 12 sec.

entries.name: Voidrush
entries.desc:
Collapsing Star reduces the cooldown of Voidblade by 10 sec.

Voidblade and The Hunt briefly reduce your Fury drain while in Void Metamorphosis.

entries.name: Devourer's Bite
entries.desc: Damage from Voidblade and the Hunt increases the damage your target takes from you by 12% for 10 sec. Multiple applications may overlap.

entries.name: Impending Apocalypse
entries.desc: Each Collapsing Star you cast increases the damage of your next Collapsing Star by 30%.

entries.name: Calamitous
entries.desc: Your damaging critical strikes deal 240% damage instead of the usual 200%.

entries.name: Star Fragments
entries.desc: Collapsing Star now generates 3 Soul Fragments.

entries.name: The Hunt
entries.desc: Charge to your target, striking them for 2,285 Cosmic damage, rooting them in place for 1.5 sec and inflicting 1,628 Cosmic damage over 6 sec to up to 5 enemies in your path.

entries.name: Emptiness
entries.desc: Every soul consumed in Void Metamorphosis grants 0.25% haste, up to 25%.

entries.name: Soul Glutton
entries.desc:
Void Metamorphosis requires 15 less souls.

Your Fury drains 25% faster while in Void Metamorphosis.

entries.name: Eradicate
entries.desc:
Fully channeling Void Ray upgrades your Reap to Eradicate.

 Eradicate
Slam your Scythe to the ground, dealing 2,558 Cosmic damage to your primary target and 2,558 to all other enemies within a 25 yd cone in front of you. Damage reduced beyond 5 targets.

Eradicate gathers up to 4 nearby souls.

entries.name: Midnight
entries.desc: Collapsing Star always critically strikes.

entries.name: World Killer
entries.desc: The third Voidfall meteor strike called down in sequence is larger, has 50% increased area, deals 50% increased damage, and generates 1 Soul Fragment.

entries.name: Otherworldly Focus
entries.desc:
Collapsing Star and Voidfall meteors deal 35% increased damage when striking a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 5%.

entries.name: Dark Matter
entries.desc: Your first Collapsing Star after casting Void Metamorphosis causes a Cosmic meteor shower to assault the area, dealing 2,307 Cosmic damage over 6 sec.

entries.name: Final Hour
entries.desc: Passive bonuses granted by each stack of Voidfall persist for 8 sec after being consumed.

entries.name: Meteoric Fall
entries.desc: While at 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes all 3 to rapidly call down that many meteor strikes.

entries.name: Mass Acceleration
entries.desc: Gain 3 stacks of Voidfall and reset the cooldown of Reap upon activating Void Metamorphosis.

entries.name: Path to Oblivion
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 3% increased movement speed.

entries.name: State of Matter
entries.desc: Shift has 1 additional charge.

entries.name: Voidfall
entries.desc:
Consume has a 35% chance to grant 1 stack of Voidfall.

Upon reaching 3 stacks of Voidfall, Reap consumes a stack to reach into the Void and call down a meteor strike at your target's location, dealing 674 Cosmic damage to all enemies within 8 yards. Damage reduced beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Doomsayer
entries.desc: Activating Void Ray out of combat or within 5 sec of entering combat calls down 3 Voidfall Meteors over its duration.

entries.name: Harness the Cosmos
entries.desc: Voidfall Meteor damage increased by 15%.

entries.name: Celestial Echoes
entries.desc: Consume generates 2 additional Fury and deals 15% increased damage.

entries.name: Phase Shift
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% reduced damage taken.

entries.name: Catastrophe
entries.desc: Enemies struck by a Voidfall Meteor take an additional 25% damage over 8 sec.

entries.name: Swift Erasure
entries.desc: Each stack of Voidfall grants 2% Haste.

entries.name: Meteoric Rise
entries.desc:
Void Ray damage increased by 15%.

Fully channeling Void Ray generates 1 stack of Voidfall.

entries.name: Monster Rising
entries.desc: Intellect increased by 15% while not in demon form.

entries.name: Blind Focus
entries.desc:
Cosmic damage increased by 2%.

Effect is doubled while in demon form.

entries.name: Enduring Torment
entries.desc: The effects of your demon form persist outside of it in a weakened state, increasing Mastery: Monster Within's effectiveness by 20%.

entries.name: Student of Suffering
entries.desc: Void Ray applies Student of Suffering to you, increasing Mastery by 10.6% and granting 5 Fury every 2 sec, for 6 sec.

entries.name: Flamebound
entries.desc: Hungering Slash has 2 yd increased radius and 50% increased critical strike damage bonus.

entries.name: Undying Embers
entries.desc: Soul Immolation has a 25% chance to reignite after it expires, reapplying its effect.

entries.name: Untethered Fury
entries.desc: Maximum Fury increased by 20.

entries.name: Volatile Instinct
entries.desc: Entering demon form causes your next Voidsurge to repeat after a short delay.

entries.name: Burning Blades
entries.desc:
Your blades burn with Cosmic energy, causing your Voidblade, Hungering Slash, and Throw Glaive to deal an additional 35% damage as Cosmic damage.

Reap damage increased by 20%.

entries.name: Demonsurge
entries.desc:
Void Metamorphosis now also greatly empowers Voidblade and Hungering Slash.

While demon form is active, the first cast of each empowered ability induces a Voidsurge, causing you to explode with Void energy, dealing 2,359 Cosmic damage to nearby enemies. Deals reduced damage beyond 8 targets.

entries.name: Focused Hatred
entries.desc:
Voidsurge deals 50% increased damage when it strikes a single target.

Each additional target reduces this bonus by 10%.

entries.name: Wave of Debilitation
entries.desc: Chaos Nova slows enemies by 60% and reduces attack and cast speed by 15% for 5 sec after its stun fades.

entries.name: Pursuit of Angriness
entries.desc: Movement speed increased by 1% per 10 Fury.

entries.name: Violent Transformation
entries.desc:
Entering Void Metamorphosis resets the cooldown of Voidblade and The Hunt.

The Hunt deals 25% increased damage and resets the cooldown of Soul Immolation.

entries.name: Demonic Intensity
entries.desc:
Activating Void Metamorphosis greatly empowers The Hunt.

Voidsurge damage is increased by 10% for each time it previously triggered while your demon form is active.

entries.name: Set Fire to the Pain
entries.desc:
5% of all non-Fire damage taken is instead taken as Fire damage over 6 sec.

Fire damage taken reduced by 10%.

entries.name: Improved Soul Rending
entries.desc: Leech granted by Soul Rending increased by 2% and an additional 2% while Void Metamorphosis is active.
